---
title: "CV / Resume"
---

## Resume

You can view my resume below or open it directly as a PDF.

<a class="button-primary" href="resume.pdf" target="_blank">Open Resume PDF</a>

<br><br>

<iframe src="resume.pdf" width="100%" height="850px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px;">
</iframe>
